title: SWEET RELIEF MUSICAN FUND - 211info
text: SWEET RELIEF SWEET RELIEF MUSICAN FUND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance. 2650 E Imperial Highway Suite 208 Brea, CA 92821 Eligibility: Individuals who are professional musicians or music industry workers who have recently had a serious medical or mental condition that affects applicant's ability to work and can show that 50% of their income comes from said industry Hours: No standard hours Email (714) 626-0447 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (714) 626-0447 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete online application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: May request tax returns, bank statements, and/or any other information deemed necessary to verify such need. AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Musicians If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SWEET RELIEF
